headline: S&P Global, Cambridge Associates and Mercer Launch Private Markets Performance Datasets for Private Credit and Real Assets
summary: S&P Global (NYSE: SPGI) today announced the launch of the S&P Global, Cambridge Associates, Mercer Private Markets Performance Analytics datasets, the first release from the collaboration introduced in 2025. The datasets – developed in collaboration with Cambridge Associates and Mercer, a Marsh Business ("Mercer") – are designed to help investors compare performance, manage risk, underwrite deals and determine portfolio impacts. headline: Here’s Why S&P Global Inc (SPGI) Rebounded from September Pullback
summary: Baron Capital, an investment management company, released its “Baron Financials ETF” fourth-quarter 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. In the fourth quarter, the Fund fell 2.22% (Institutional Shares) compared to a 7.19% decline for the FactSet Global FinTech Index (Benchmark) and a 2.07% gain for the MSCI USA Financials […]

headline: S&P Global Names Firdaus Bhathena as Chief Technology & Transformation Officer to Lead Next Phase of Growth and Innovation
summary: S&P Global (NYSE: SPGI) today announced the appointment of Firdaus Bhathena as its new Executive Vice President and Chief Technology and Transformation Officer (CTTO), effective April 27, 2026.

headline: U.S. gasoline hits $4 per gallon, highest since 2022, as Iran war drives up fuel prices more than 30%

headline: Three niche commodity prices are surging. What they show about China's grip on supply chains
summary: In the wake of the Iran war, prices are surging for critical elements used in defense and the semiconductors that power artificial intelligence advances.
